rules.name: ec2-manager-scaler
rules.description: Auto-scale EC2 instance pool: process queue, scale up/down, ensure warm pool

rules.name: ec2-manager-health
rules.description: Health check all active/warm instances, terminate unhealthy ones

rules.name: extraction-manager
rules.description: Check extraction queue and auto-start/stop extraction instance

notes.scaler_frequency: 30 seconds balances responsiveness with Lambda invocation costs (~$2/month)
notes.health_interval: 60 seconds with 3-strike threshold = 3 min max detection time
notes.extraction_interval: 5 minutes is sufficient since extractions run for hours
